memberdef.argsstring: (struct llext_loader *loader, struct llext *ext, const elf_rela_t *rel, const elf_sym_t *sym, uint8_t *rel_addr, const struct llext_load_param *ldr_parm)
memberdef.name: arch_elf_relocate_local

briefdescription.para: Architecture specific function for local binding relocations.

parameterdescription.para: Address where relocation should be performed

simplesect.para: 0 on success or a negative error code

memberdef.argsstring: (struct llext_loader *loader, struct llext *ext, const elf_rela_t *rel, const elf_sym_t *sym, uint8_t *rel_addr, const void *link_addr)
memberdef.name: arch_elf_relocate_global

briefdescription.para: Architecture specific function for global binding relocations.

parameterdescription.para: Address where relocation should be performed

simplesect.para: 0 on success or a negative error code

briefdescription.para: Private header for linkable loadable extensions.
